case_title: JOSEPHINE HARRINGTON VS. THE ACADEMIC ADVANTAGE, INC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARRINGTON, JOSEPHINE AS TO DEFENDANT THE ACADEMIC ADVANTAGE, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
